caption: In the video, a woman is giving a presentation in front of an audience. She is standing to the left side of the frame, holding a tablet and gesturing with her right hand as she speaks. The projection screen behind her displays a slide titled "How I've quantified myself," featuring various pie charts and graphs that seem to represent different aspects of personal data tracking. The text on the slide mentions "2009: 750words.com" and "Unfiltered, private journaling," suggesting a focus on self-reflection and data analysis. A man wearing a green beanie is seated in the foreground, attentively watching the presentation. The setting appears to be a professional or educational environment, likely a conference or seminar room.
